---
title: "Getting Started"
---

Welcome to joshpy! This section will help you get up and running quickly.

## Installation

See [Installation](installation.qmd) for detailed instructions on installing joshpy
and its optional dependencies.

## Quickstart

The [Quickstart](quickstart.qmd) guide walks through running your first parameter
sweep in under 5 minutes.

## Next Steps

After completing the quickstart, explore the [Tutorials](../tutorials/index.qmd)
for more in-depth workflows:

- [Manual Workflow](../tutorials/manual-workflow.qmd) - Full control over each step
- [SweepManager](../tutorials/sweep-manager.qmd) - Simplified high-level interface
- [Analysis & Visualization](../tutorials/analysis.qmd) - Explore and visualize results
